questions.text: What is the purpose of an HTTP status code?

solutions.1: To assign a unique ID to each request
solutions.2: To identify wether the response was received by the client
solutions.3: To identify the status of a client's request

questions.text: What HTTP request method is commonly used to retrive data from a server?
True or false: every http request must have a body
What is a role of a cookie in the HTTP protocol?

solutions.1: To store information for advertisements and tracking
solutions.2: To store client data on the server for future use
solutions.3: To store state on a client's browser across multiple HTTP requests
solutions.4: To encrypt traffic between the client and server

questions.text: Which technology does HTTPS use to verify a website's identity?
Why is HTTPS preferred over HTTP

solutions.1: Attackers cannot intercept and modify traffic sent with HTTPS
solutions.2: Search engines rank HTTPS websites higher
solutions.3: Attackers cannot tamper with traffic sent with HTTPS
